# Error handlers

@dynatrace-sdk/error-handlers

## 1.3.1

### Patch Changes

- web runtime name updated in console logs and errors.

## 1.3.0

### Minor Changes

- Deprecate `body`, add optional `cause` and `details` to `SerializedError`.

## 1.2.0

### Minor Changes

- Add optional `traceId` to `SerializedError`.

## 1.1.1

### Patch Changes

- Update documentation

## 1.1.0

### Minor Changes

- Add optional `errorRef` to `SerializedError`

## 1.0.0

### Major Changes

- Initial public release.
